form.formComment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by half a length at Horsham over 410m (23.46) beating Cheeky Alessia in Mix 6/7 on April 7. Looks a solid hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance after tracking the speed to win by half a length at Horsham over 410m (23.46) beating Cheeky Alessia in Mix 6/7 on April 7. Looks a solid hope.

form.formComment: Showing promise and was a winner three back. Last start missed the frame when a 7 length fourth (30.56) at this track. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showing promise and was a winner three back. Last start missed the frame when a 7 length fourth (30.56) at this track. Well placed here and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 2nd over 425m at Bendigo beaten 2.25 lengths (23.95) behind Strop in a Special conditions race on April 5. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 2nd over 425m at Bendigo beaten 2.25 lengths (23.95) behind Strop in a Special conditions race on April 5. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Went down narrowly in a Mix 6/7 at this track latest when a half a length second but did record a solid 30.07 over the 525m trip. Rates a top chance with a repeat here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Went down narrowly in a Mix 6/7 at this track latest when a half a length second but did record a solid 30.07 over the 525m trip. Rates a top chance with a repeat here.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning comfortably by 3.5 lengths at Horsham (27.32) beating Laminate in a Restricted WIN on April 7 four days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and he needs to find another gear.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after winning comfortably by 3.5 lengths at Horsham (27.32) beating Laminate in a Restricted WIN on April 7 four days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and he needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Sandown over 515m in 29.73. Followed that up with a minor placing over 525m at this track at Mix 6/7 a week ago. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Strong performance to score by a 0.9 lengths in a Mix 6/7 last start at Shepparton, clocking a solid 25.36 over the 450m trip. Harder here but worth including in multiples.

formComments.comment: Strong performance to score by a 0.9 lengths in a Mix 6/7 last start at Shepparton, clocking a solid 25.36 over the 450m trip. Harder here but worth including in multiples.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Ballarat (25.36) in a Mix 6/7, finishing a one length second. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Geelong over 460m in 26.38. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 515m at Sandown at Restricted WIN level. Needs to find a bit more.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a Mix 6/7 on April 6 over 450m at Shepparton behind Wanbi beaten 3.5 lengths (25.61). Overdue and expected to feature again.
